title: duolingo cpvp
description:
🦉 Duolingo Texture Pack – CPvP Edition

Make your Crystal PvP faster, cleaner, and more fun with the Duolingo Texture Pack!
Inspired by the iconic green Duo Owl, this pack combines clean visuals, high contrast, and CPvP optimization.
body:
🦉 Duolingo Texture Pack – CPvP Edition

Make your Crystal PvP faster, cleaner, and more fun with the Duolingo Texture Pack!
Inspired by the iconic green Duo Owl, this pack combines clean visuals, high contrast, and CPvP optimization.

⚔️ Features

🔮 Clear End Crystal textures for better visibility and faster reactions

💥 Reduced explosion particles to minimize screen clutter

❤️ High-contrast hearts & HUD in Duolingo style

🧱 Simplified blocks for improved fight awareness

🟢 Green Duolingo-themed UI & items

🚀 FPS-friendly – works great on low and high-end PCs

🎯 Perfect for

Crystal PvP (CPvP)

Anarchy servers

Practice servers

Competitive PvP

📦 Pack Info

Resolution: 16x16

Minecraft versions: 1.8.x – 1.20+ (version-dependent)

Style: Clean • Funny • PvP Optimized

“Do your CPvP… or Duo will remind you.” 🦉💥
idea from Poolraven
textures from oskar
